name: ruview
description: RuView Marketplace: Claude Code + Codex plugins for WiFi sensing — configuration, applications, model training, and onboarding, from practical to advanced

plugins.name: ruview
plugins.description: End-to-end RuView toolkit: getting started, ESP32 hardware setup, configuration, sensing applications (presence / vitals / pose / sleep / MAT), camera-free + camera-supervised model training, advanced multistatic sensing, CLI / API / WASM, mmWave radar, and witness verification
